# ghentapi_org_setting (Resource)

Manages a set of organisation-level settings. Only the keys present in `settings` are managed; all other org settings are left untouched.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "organizations" {
  type    = list(string)
  default = ["my-org"]
}

resource "ghentapi_org_setting" "this" {
  for_each = toset(var.organizations)

  organization = each.key

  # Only the keys listed here are managed; all other org settings are left untouched.
  settings = {
    billing_email = "github@example.com"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) GitHub organisation login.
- `settings` (Map of String) Map of setting key → value. Only these keys are drift-checked; unmanaged fields are ignored.

### Read-Only

- `api_response` (String, Sensitive) Full JSON body from the last successful GET (for debugging).
